title: Duzzit Glass Wipes - Cleans & Shines | 100% Biodegradable - Made From Plant Fibres | Suitable for Windows, Glass Objects and Mirrors (60 Biodegradable Wipes)
features: STREAK-FREE SHINE ON GLASS: These biodegradable glass wipes lift dirt, smudges and water marks with ease, leaving a streak-free shine on windows, mirrors, and other glass. Great for a quick refresh before guests arrive or for daily cleaning in high-traffic areas.

100% BIODEGRADABLE PLANT FIBRES: Made from eco-conscious plant-based fibres, these glass wipes are fully biodegradable. Ideal for anyone looking to reduce waste without compromising on performance, whether at home, in the office or car.

MULTI-SURFACE GLASS CLEANER: Perfect for use on windows, mirrors, glass coffee tables, vases, and even car windscreens. These versatile wipes can be used in the home, office, or as part of a car glass cleaner routine.

QUICK AND CONVENIENT TO USE: With no sprays or cloths needed, these wipes are a mess-free solution to daily cleaning. Great for busy households, car interiors, or as part of a bathroom cleaner caddy for sparkling results in seconds.
RESEALABLE PACK FOR FRESHNESS: The easy-open, resealable pack keeps wipes moist and fresh from the first wipe to the last. Store with other cleaning supplies so they’re always ready when needed.
IDEAL FOR BATHROOM MIRRORS AND GLASS SHOWERS: These wipes work brilliantly as a shower glass cleaner, cutting through soap scum and water spots on screens, mirrors and other bathroom surfaces.

PERFECT FOR WINDOW CLEANING KITS: Whether used on their own or as part of a full window cleaning kit, these wipes help achieve crystal-clear results quickly and easily. Keep them handy in the kitchen drawer or glovebox for everyday use.

GREAT FOR CARS AND ON THE GO: Keep a pack in the glovebox to use as a car glass cleaner when travelling. Perfect for removing fingerprints, smears and dust from windscreens, side mirrors and dashboards in seconds.

LIGHTLY FRAGRANCED AND KIND TO SKIN: These wipes are gentle enough to use regularly and leave behind a clean, fresh scent. Ideal for sensitive hands during daily cleaning routines in kitchens, bathrooms and beyond.

EVERYDAY ESSENTIAL CLEANING PRODUCT: Add these glass wipes to everyday cleaning products for quick touch-ups or deeper cleaning sessions. They're a simple yet effective way to keep glass and mirrors spotless all week long.
description: Product Description Bring back the sparkle with Duzzit Glass Wipes – the quick, eco-friendly way to achieve streak-free shine on glass, mirrors and more. Made from 100% biodegradable plant fibres, these strong yet gentle wipes are the perfect addition to any window cleaning kit or everyday cleaning supplies. Each resealable pack contains 60 wipes, ideal for tackling smudges, fingerprints and marks on windows, mirrors, glass tables, car windows, shower screens, vases and more. Whether you're refreshing bathroom glass or touching up the windscreen before a drive, these wipes are a practical, time-saving solution. Designed to clean and shine in seconds, they leave behind a fresh, light scent and a sparkling finish every time. Keep a pack in the kitchen, bathroom, car or office for effortless cleaning wherever it’s needed. These wipes are skin-kind, surface-safe, and perfect for homes that care about cleanliness and the environment. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Perfume, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Linalyl Acetate, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzisothiazolinone. Directions * Peel back resealable label on the front of pack * Remove wipes as required * Wipe across surface and leave to dry. * Carefully reseal pack after use to prevent wipes from drying out.
